All al.com links opened in FB detect adguard and I get the pop up telling me to disable it. This is new and only started about a month ago. Prior to this, I had no problem opening the links in FB with adguard enabled. > > You recently fixed a similar issue with al.com links not opening in the browser when adguard was enabled. If I direct fb to open the link externally, it will open without a problem. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/ko/welcome.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fko%2Fwelcome.html) ### Comment > Since yesterday, enabling AdGuard has caused all internet connectivity to stop working. I tried disabling each of the four protections individually — ad blocking, tracking protection, DNS protection, and the firewall — and also turned them all off at the same time, but the internet remains unavailable whenever AdGuard is turned on. This affects not only Chrome but also messaging apps, which are unable to send messages due to the loss of internet connection. The issue persists after multiple updates, which is why I am submitting this error report. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/l7rr20pakf4kgk8cs8gsco0c8wokcg0pp3w4v3bjs0.jpg?nc=1)

issue.title: Google Play: in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Din.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)

### Comment
> 🔹If i set dns service to dns.adguard-dns.com or family.adguard-dns.com or unfiltered server in device settings i can browse all apps except amazon (india) app normally. Even amazon website (.in/.com) loads properly in browser. Amazon app shows an unending loading screen as shown in attached screenshots.
> 🔹I also noticed some difficulty occasionally while downloading ad-ons in Firefox browser.
> 🔹 I tried device restart etc. but it does not fix this issue.
> 🔹 Even dns check shows server is connected (singapore).
> 🔹 Using alternate services like quad9 or controlD works fine. Even with private dns turned off, this issue does not happen.
> 🔹 This issue has been happening from past 4 days.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8ucc2wzqchcskgkccskk0kck4kswwowec0ebkgqgio.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/axz3qghpa1skcgk4k08skws0owkwcwcen52vy9q5xk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default

System version: | `android 12`
Browser: | Firefox

[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Din.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)

### Comment
> 🔹If i set dns service to dns.adguard-dns.com or family.adguard-dns.com or unfiltered server in device settings i can browse all apps except amazon (india) app normally. Even amazon website (.in/.com) loads properly in browser. Amazon app shows an unending loading screen as shown in attached screenshots.
> 🔹I also noticed some difficulty occasionally while downloading ad-ons in Firefox browser.
> 🔹 I tried device restart etc. but it does not fix this issue.
> 🔹 Even dns check shows server is connected (singapore).
> 🔹 Using alternate services like quad9 or controlD works fine. Even with private dns turned off, this issue does not happen.
> 🔹 This issue has been happening from past 4 days.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8ucc2wzqchcskgkccskk0kck4kswwowec0ebkgqgio.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/axz3qghpa1skcgk4k08skws0owkwcwcen52vy9q5xk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

review.body:
> utm_compaign is blocked by generic rule.

I didn't find `utm_compaign` in generic filters. ([Code search result `repo:AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters utm_compaign`](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAdguardTeam%2FAdguardFilters%20utm_compaign&type=code)). Therefore, I separate rules for each parameter regarding your feedback.

> Alex: MV3 extension does not support regexp in this modifier. `$removeparam=aaa|bbb` also not supported. 
>
> Devs recommends to use separate rules for each parameter. This also makes it easier to troubleshoot rules when issues arise due to a rule.

> utm_compaign is blocked by generic rule.

I didn't find `utm_compaign` in generic filters. ([Code search result `repo:AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters utm_compaign`](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAdguardTeam%2FAdguardFilters%20utm_compaign&type=code)). Therefore, I separate rules for each parameter regarding your feedback.

> Alex: MV3 extension does not support regexp in this modifier. `$removeparam=aaa|bbb` also not supported. 
>
> Devs recommends to use separate rules for each parameter. This also makes it easier to troubleshoot rules when issues arise due to a rule.

> utm_compaign is blocked by generic rule.

I didn't find `utm_compaign` in generic filters. ([Code search result `repo:AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters utm_compaign`](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAdguardTeam%2FAdguardFilters%20utm_compaign&type=code)). Therefore, I separate rules for each parameter regarding your feedback.

> Alex: MV3 extension does not support regexp in this modifier. `$removeparam=aaa|bbb` also not supported. 
>
> Devs recommends to use separate rules for each parameter. This also makes it easier to troubleshoot rules when issues arise due to a rule.

issue.title: Google Play: in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Din.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)

### Comment
> 🔹If i set dns service to dns.adguard-dns.com or family.adguard-dns.com or unfiltered server in device settings i can browse all apps except amazon (india) app normally. Even amazon website (.in/.com) loads properly in browser. Amazon app shows an unending loading screen as shown in attached screenshots.
> 🔹I also noticed some difficulty occasionally while downloading ad-ons in Firefox browser.
> 🔹 I tried device restart etc. but it does not fix this issue.
> 🔹 Even dns check shows server is connected (singapore).
> 🔹 Using alternate services like quad9 or controlD works fine. Even with private dns turned off, this issue does not happen.
> 🔹 This issue has been happening from past 4 days.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8ucc2wzqchcskgkccskk0kck4kswwowec0ebkgqgio.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/axz3qghpa1skcgk4k08skws0owkwcwcen52vy9q5xk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default

System version: | `android 12`
Browser: | Firefox

@AdguardTeam/filters-maintainers please also check this out.

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=in.amazon.mShop.android.shopping](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Din.amazon.mShop.android.shopping)

### Comment
> 🔹If i set dns service to dns.adguard-dns.com or family.adguard-dns.com or unfiltered server in device settings i can browse all apps except amazon (india) app normally. Even amazon website (.in/.com) loads properly in browser. Amazon app shows an unending loading screen as shown in attached screenshots.
> 🔹I also noticed some difficulty occasionally while downloading ad-ons in Firefox browser.
> 🔹 I tried device restart etc. but it does not fix this issue.
> 🔹 Even dns check shows server is connected (singapore).
> 🔹 Using alternate services like quad9 or controlD works fine. Even with private dns turned off, this issue does not happen.
> 🔹 This issue has been happening from past 4 days.
